unconditional_matched.note: Matched on strategy=top-p and temperature=0.8. Prefix uses top_p=0.95; unconditional also uses top_p=0.95 (same --top-p flag in generation script).

decision: Case A: matched comparison confirms prefix advantage (+26.7pp completion). The matched unconditional subset (topp_t0.8, n=10) has identical rates to the full unconditional pool (60%), so the v7 +27pt figure was not a decoding-condition mixing artifact.
caveat: Matched comparison uses n=10 unconditional vs n=15 prefix — small samples, no statistical test applied.
